name: Recipefork Photo Generator
description: Photo-to-recipe generation surface for AI food apps. Combines image upload/drop zone, preview, prompt/context controls, generation status, and generated recipe result panel.

split.description: Upload/preview panel beside generated recipe preview on desktop, stacked on mobile.

slots.upload: Drop zone, file picker, image preview, and remove/replace controls
slots.controls: Optional prompt, cuisine, dietary, or serving controls
slots.status: Generation progress, streaming status, and error state
slots.result: Generated recipe title, ingredients, instructions, and save/fork actions

single.description: Single-column mobile-first generator with upload first and result below.

visual_brief: A utility-first AI kitchen page where the food photo and generated recipe are the two anchors. The upload state should feel trustworthy and obvious; the generated result should look like an editable RecipeFork recipe, not a detached AI transcript.

layout_hints.brownfield_fit: If the existing project already uses shadcn upload/card controls, keep them and map Decantr intent into those classes.
layout_hints.status_visibility: Generation status must remain visible after upload; do not hide loading/errors inside the image region only.
layout_hints.result_editability: Generated recipe sections should be structured so they can be saved, edited, or assigned to a cookbook.

micro.drop: Drop zone border may strengthen on drag-over.
micro.loading: Generation status may use shimmer or progress pulse without animating the uploaded image.

transitions.result: Generated result may fade in once the first useful recipe fields are available.

responsive.mobile: Stack upload, status, and result. Keep the primary generate action reachable without horizontal scrolling.
responsive.tablet: Stack or split depending on available width.
responsive.desktop: Two-column split with upload controls left and generated recipe right.

keyboard: File input, generate, retry, remove image, save, and edit controls must be keyboard reachable.
announcements: Announce upload success, generation start, generation errors, and generated recipe readiness.
